toast.simukraft.title: Sim-U-Kraft
message.simukraft.welcome: Thank you for downloading and playing New:SimuKraft (NSUK)! This mod is redeveloped by NSUK New SimuKraft Development Team.
message.simukraft.welcome.refactor_editi:
Official QQ Groups: 1046985079 | 638462178 | 1084921979.
[If you paid for this content, congratulations, you've been scammed!]
advancement.simukraft.first_dream.title: A Grand Dream
advancement.simukraft.first_dream.descri: Is this all... just a dream?
advancement.simukraft.guide_book.title: Huh!? I Have an Idea
advancement.simukraft.guide_book.descrip: What if I combine it with a build box... maybe something surprising will happen.....
advancement.simukraft.city_core.title: A... New Thing??
advancement.simukraft.city_core.descript: Will right-clicking it bring a surprise??
advancement.simukraft.build_box.title: A New Beginning
advancement.simukraft.build_box.descript: Craft a build box... but it feels like something is still missing...
advancement.simukraft.farmland_box.title: The Great Age of Agriculture
advancement.simukraft.logistics_client.d: Will it deliver to my home... yay!
